flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Princeton University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.0k → $62.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Princeton University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.0k → $62.7k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Princeton University are 92% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($110.1k vs $57.4k).
